notes: Chunk contains a single event: Q3 FY2025 earnings call transcript CAKE_2025-10-28T17.00, part 1 of 2; names coined only from visible part.
fiscal_kpis key is null for this chunk (KPIs live on chunk_001), so no KPI-derived candidates.

Used same_store_sales (not cheesecake_factory_same_store_sales) for flagship-brand comps because Cheesecake Factory is also the company legal name, which is banned in driver_name; North Italia and Flower Child brand comps kept as separate brand-level drivers per R9.

Skipped as vague, duplicative, or single-instance bookkeeping (12): consolidated revenue recitation, G&A flat, depreciation, convertible notes/liquidity/debt balances, FRC acquisition-related expenses, FRC segment sales total, rewards app under development, consumer trade-down behavior (folded into consumer_spending), North Italia honeymoon effect, new-restaurant average weekly sales above $200,000, guest satisfaction/team engagement scores, kitchen systems optimization.
government_shutdown and los_angeles_wildfires coined as reusable event classes per R10 (parallel to the ontology's government_shutdown example).
